notes: Annuity payment routing requires product-specific validation; PRELSA payee/owner roles are primary signals.
Business owner policies should prefer explicit payee and owner roles with TIN-bearing entities.
Death claim payee resolution should prefer explicit PE, then primary beneficiary, then trust roles.
PACTG blank PAYEE_RELA_CODE rows require PRELSA fallback; beneficiary/owner resolution is most common.
Surrender disbursements commonly route to owner or explicit payee when PE is absent on PACTG.
Trustee/custodian precedence expected when trust indicators or business owner patterns are present.
